case_title: WONG, DERRICK DBA QUALITY PLUMB/WATER HEATERS UNLI VS MERRIWETHER, INGRID DBA ARISCO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, DERRICK DBA QUALITY PLUMB/WATER HEATERS UNLI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERRIWETHER, INGRID DBA ARISCO OC AS TO DEFT CHAVARRIA-UNTIMELY SERVED. POS ON MERRIWEATHER WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,900.00 FILED BY WONG, DERRICK DBA QUALITY PLUMB/WATER HEATERS UNLI AS TO DEFENDANT MERRIWETHER, INGRID DBA ARISCO CHAVARRIA, MAC DBA ARISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
